texto: Writing is the one thing I know I will never grow tired of in life
autor: the one thing I could do until the day I die and still feel like I haven’t done enough.
explicacao: Citação de the one thing I could do until the day I die and still feel like I haven’t done enough. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Writing is the one thing I know I will never grow tired of in life” articula reflexao, allison-j-kennedy, writing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
